note: seq=39: FIX atlas-socrata crash-loop -- it fail-loud-exited (sys.exit 2/3) on 0-fetched, which is NORMAL for a continuous lane (and happens during PG-down or momentary API empty). Add SOCRATA_ALLOW_EMPTY tolerance + set it in the service. Deploy fixed script + service + reset-failed (timer re-runs it; not run inline so it can't fail the apply).

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/socrata_import.py':'0b8ad57b2fa86f9429fa83e63ebd7e9fab17941632d11472bbdf028f02fd2b66'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Socrata continuous lane (Chicago+NYC; tolerates 0-new)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
IOSchedulingClass=idle
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=SOCRATA_PAGE=50000
Environment=SOCRATA_ALLOW_EMPTY=1
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/socrata_import.py
TimeoutStartSec=6h
